findings.title: SSH Brute Force Exposure
findings.detail: SSH service is exposed with password authentication enabled and no rate limiting.
findings.remediation: Disable password authentication. Use key-based auth only. Implement fail2ban or similar.

findings.title: TLS 1.0/1.1 Enabled
findings.detail: Web server accepts deprecated TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 connections.
findings.remediation: Disable TLS 1.0 and 1.1. Allow TLS 1.2 minimum, prefer TLS 1.3.

findings.title: Missing Security Headers
findings.detail: HTTP responses missing Content-Security-Policy and X-Frame-Options headers.
findings.remediation: Configure web server to send required security headers on all responses.
